title: Detect incompatible license combinations
description: Check pairwise compatibility of the combined license set, since some licenses cannot legally coexist in one distributed work.
body: Use when multiple licenses are linked into a single distributed artifact. Do not assume two open-source licenses are automatically combinable. Actions: build the set of effective licenses in the artifact, check known one-way incompatibilities (e.g. Apache-2.0 code cannot be combined into a GPL-2.0-only work; GPL and proprietary cannot be statically linked), and flag the offending pair with the components. Validation signals include a compatibility check over the inventory that lists every conflicting pair, and a test that fails the build on a known-incompatible combination. Risk boundary: a detected incompatibility blocks distribution and is routed to counsel, not resolved by suppressing the warning.
